name: Greek Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the Swiss cheese very finely.
2. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
3. Press the feta and ricotta cheese through a sieve into a bowl.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the cheeses and honey until smooth.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
7. Prepare the topping by drizzling honey over the cake and dusting with cinnamon.
8. Bake the cake for about 55 minutes, or until set. Cool to room temperature, then chill.
